name: Potpourri for Simmering
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the zest (the colored part) from the citrus fruits using a vegetable peeler.
2. Place the zest on a baking sheet and put it in a turned-off gas oven overnight, or until completely dry (the pilot light will help dry them). If you have an electric oven, warm it for 10 minutes at 200 degrees, then turn off.
3. Combine all ingredients in an airtight container. This makes about 1 1/2 cups.
4. To simmer, use 1/3 cup of the potpourri mixture in a saucepan of water and cook over low heat.
